title: JAMstack
body:
# JAMstack: an alternative to traditional WordPress web creation

Introduction to JAMstack, where you will learn what you need to know to become interested in this alternative to creating monolithic websites with WordPress.

[https://jamstack.org/](https://jamstack.org/)

## Speaker

-   [Daniel Seoane](https://2020.spain.wordcamp.org/speaker/daniel-seoane/)

Categories [Development](https://2020.spain.wordcamp.org/session-category/desarrollo/)

Did you attend this session? [Leave a comment.](https://2020.spain.wordcamp.org/session/jamstack-una-alternativa-a-la-creacion-tradicional-de-webs-con-wordpress/feedback/#sft-feedback)
